creator: jpb@jimby.name
text:
The attached changes include two minor changes to the virtualization _index.adoc file, one to the "tags" line and the other to the list of virtualization platforms.

The change also includes all the image files that will be needed for the remaining changes.  They are located in:
.../static/images/books/handbook/virtualization/qemu-freebsdNN.png

This change is related to  #263326.

I've staged all then changes on my personal server at:
https://www.jimby.name/fbsd_docs/documentation/public/en/books/handbook/virtualization/index.html#qemu-virtualization-host-guest   (September, 2024)

Plan is to create about a half dozen changes to the virtualization chapter.
QEMU will be inserted between VirtualBox and Byhve, and will have the following sections: (Chapter numbers are automatically assigned.)

24.6. FreeBSD as a Host and Guest with QEMU
24.6.1. Installing QEMU Software
24.6.2. Virtual Machine Install
24.6.3. Usage Tips
24.6.4. Adding a Serial Port Interface to a Guest VM
24.6.5. QEMU User Mode Emulation
24.6.6. Using the QEMU Monitor
24.6.7. Using QEMU USB Devices
24.6.8. Using Host USB Devices via Passthrough
24.6.9. QEMU on FreeBSD Summary
